root_cause: Lesson 1-8 code_watch.dialogue[3] (step 4 of 6) is missing the 'text' field. CodeWatchBlock passed step.text (undefined) to DialogueBubble which called text.split() on it.
fix_description: 1) DialogueBubble.tsx: renderText() now accepts optional text and returns null on falsy input. Component returns null early when text is missing. 2) CodeWatchBlock.tsx: added .filter(s => s.text) to skip malformed dialogue steps. 3) AnalogyBlock.tsx: renderCode() now guards against undefined text. 4) PartPage.tsx: replaced unsafe a.id.split('-')[1] with safe parseLessonId(). 5) New utility lessonId.ts: parseLessonId() safely handles undefined/null/malformed inputs.
